quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Cf: A data transformation on a logical table. This is a variant type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be non-null.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Ca.Description: A transform operation that casts a column to a different type.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Cr.Description: An operation that creates calculated columns. Columns created in one such operation form a lexical closure.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Fi.Description: An operation that filters rows based on some condition.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Pr.Description: An operation that projects columns. Operations that come after a projection can only refer to projected columns.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Re.Description: An operation that renames a column.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Ta.Description: An operation that tags a column with additional information.
